## Verification

- [ ] Frontend build passes (`cd frontend && npm run build`)
- [ ] Backend smoke passes when backend changes are included (`./scripts/backend-smoke.sh`)
- [ ] Full backend test suite passes when required (`cd backend && ./mvnw test`)
- [ ] WebSocket smoke checklist reviewed when notification/websocket code is touched (`frontend/docs/websocket-smoke-checklist.md`)
- [ ] `npm run smoke:websocket` executed when websocket-related files are changed
